name: Pariu cu viața
overview: Pariu cu viața is a musical phenomen comedy-drama television series that airs on Pro TV in Romania. It focuses on a love story between two teenagers with a big passion for music, their family connections and the life of a music group formed at their high school. This series of a generation arrives in Spain, Italy and continued to expand all over the world.

trailers.title: Pariu cu viata - primul serial muzical romanesc la ProTV
